rent.note: furnished 1BR in Centro/Guadiana; avg MXN 16,500 (~$940) in early 2026

groceries.note: home cooking; mix of mercado and supermarket (Mega/Walmart present)

diningOut.note: strong restaurant scene; touristic area raises prices vs other MX cities

transit.note: city walkable; occasional taxi or bus to Querétaro/CDMX

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; boutique coworking spaces cater to expat community

misc.note: gym, toiletries, entertainment, art events, spa; upscale expat scene inflates misc

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base.

evidence.claim: avg 1BR rent MXN 16,500 (~$940 USD) in early 2026; range $630–$1,370
evidence.quote: As of early 2026, the average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment is around MXN 16,500 (approximately USD 940). Most 1-bedrooms rent between MXN 11,000 and MXN 24,000 per month (roughly USD 630 to USD 1,370)
High-speed internet costs about $30 to $50 USD monthly. Electricity averages between $60 and $150 USD per month. Water and gas combined usually fall between $30 and $50 USD

evidence.claim: SMA 64% cheaper than New York City
evidence.quote: San Miguel de Allende is 64% cheaper than New York City

evidence.claim: single traveler monthly cost ~$3,500 on high end; mid-range much lower
evidence.quote: For a single traveler, the monthly cost is approximately $3,509
